metadata.description: Custom Claude skills collection by poorants

plugins.name: ant-common-kit
plugins.description: General-purpose, cross-cutting tools usable in any project or context. Currently bundles engram — a networked PARA document brain (PARA management + knowledge-graph linking, MOC hubs, and integrity lint). Carries engram's capture-loop hooks.

plugins.name: ant-dev-kit
plugins.description: Software-development tooling. Bundles code-convention (extract, enforce, and evolve project code conventions), reflex (self-reinforcing harness — absorbs your repeated corrections into CLAUDE.md operating rules via an absorption rulebook; capture-loop sibling of code-convention), component-prototype (UI variant prototyping tournament), git-versioning (structure-based MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH computed from the git commit graph — no tags/CI/token), and repo-map (agent-friendly link-map + overview of a repo's organization, regenerable, stored in the repo). Carries reflex's capture-loop hook. Grows as more dev-focused skills are added.
